title: I Had A Little Nut-Tree
content:
I had a little nut-tree, nothing would it bear
    But a silver nutmeg and a golden pear;
    The King of Spain's daughter came to visit me,
    And all for the sake of my little nut-tree.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Walter Crane, titled "I Had A Little Nut-Tree", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
